title: Expose project .taskulus configuration to console web app
description: Make project configuration available to console web app for UI adjustments (task colors, priority colors, workflow columns).
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Goal: expose project .taskulus configuration to console web app so UI can derive task colors, priority colors, and workflow-based kanban columns. Acceptance: console can read .taskulus without manual copying; supports Radix color names (Olive, Sand, Ruby, Indigo, etc.) for tasks and priorities; workflow states drive kanban columns.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated plan: console snapshot should emit full .taskulus.yml configuration (including status/type colors and priority definitions) and console UI derives Radix color tokens from config. Removing reliance on project/config.yaml avoids fallback paths.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implement SSE refresh on .taskulus.yml changes so console live-updates config-driven UI (colors, priorities, workflows).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Ran python behave for new features and rust cucumber filtered; both passed. Console UI tests failed due to ports 5173/5174 in use and missing step defs; added step defs, need rerun UI tests after freeing ports.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added exit animation on board removals: clones removed cards and shrinks/fades via GSAP in useBoardTransitions.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Investigating dark-mode band colors: add Radix dark palette imports in console/src/styles/issue-colors.css and darken issue accent scale (DARK_ACCENT) so bands are darker in dark mode.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Applied fix: import Radix dark palettes in console/src/styles/issue-colors.css and darkened dark-mode accent scale to 5 for issue bands (muted remains 3).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusting issue band scales: dark mode one notch lighter, light mode one notch darker per request.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Pushing one more notch: light mode darker (scale 2), dark mode lighter (scale 7) for issue bands.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reverting one notch: restore light mode scale 3 and dark mode scale 6 (previous setting).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusting priority text intensity one notch lighter (scale +1).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reverting priority text intensity one notch (scale 9 -> 8).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Restoring priority text to scale 9 (one notch lighter).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Switching normal foreground text color to Sky scale 11 per request.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Setting priority text to scale 11 to match foreground intensity.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Setting issue band background (accent) scale to 5.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Set text foreground/muted tracks by theme: neutral=gray, cool=sky, warm=brown. Align muted colors to same hue tracks.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Switching warm theme text/muted to sand track (11/10).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed console run_ui_tests.ts to honor VITE_PORT in start-server-and-test wait URL.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed console UI tests base URL: world.js uses VITE_PORT fallback and run_ui_tests.ts sets CONSOLE_BASE_URL.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Made console/vite.config.ts honor VITE_PORT and CONSOLE_PORT for dev server and proxy target.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated console comment/issue detail features to switch to Tasks tab before opening task.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated selected task syncing on snapshot changes and cleaned up console time zone override between cucumber scenarios.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Console UI tests now poll /api/issues for updated issue data after file writes to avoid stale snapshots.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added optional ?refresh=1 to console API for config/issues and use it in UI tests to force snapshot refresh after issue file writes.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Normalized timestamp comparisons in console UI steps to avoid Z vs +00:00 mismatches during refresh polling.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Console server now broadcasts refreshed snapshots when ?refresh=1 is used, ensuring SSE clients update after forced refresh.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Tests: python3 -m behave; cargo fmt --check; cargo clippy -- -D warnings; cargo test; console UI tests (VITE_PORT=5175 CONSOLE_PORT=5176 npm run test:ui); tools/check_spec_parity.py. Note: black and ruff not installed locally.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Console web app can read .taskulus configuration without manual copying; front-end can map configured task and priority colors (including Radix color names) and workflow states to UI.
